mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_order (order_no, user_id, leader_id, community_id, total_amount, status, address) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{leaderId}, #{communityId}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, #{address})

INSERT INTO t_order_item (order_id, product_id, farmer_id, product_name, product_price, quantity, total_price) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{productId}, #{farmerId}, #{productName}, #{productPrice}, #{quantity}, #{totalPrice})
mapper.select: SELECT o.id, o.order_no as orderNo, o.total_amount as totalAmount, o.status, o.create_time as createTime, o.address, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(product_name SEPARATOR '、') FROM t_order_item WHERE order_id = o.id) as productNames, (SELECT product_id FROM t_order_item WHERE order_id = o.id LIMIT 1) as productId FROM t_order o WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY o.create_time DESC
